title: GPT-5.6 SOL Low-Thinking Migration
pipeline_path: plan -> configuration/doc updates -> deterministic validation -> stage-7/8 validation -> operator post-restart smoke test -> agent-resolution evidence -> documentation waiver -> closeout
pipeline_rationale: The requested work changes active OpenCode user-level configuration, agent frontmatter, and routing documentation; no application code is in scope.
test_framework: PowerShell JSON parsing plus OpenCode CLI model-selection smoke test
test_command: opencode run --model openai/gpt-5.6-sol --variant low --format json "Reply with exactly: model-ready"
runtime_validation_evidence: 2026-07-15 operator-provided JSON event stream returned text model-ready and normal step_finish reason stop for openai/gpt-5.6-sol with variant low.
agent_resolution_evidence: OpenCode CLI recognized all three named pipeline agents as subagents; a read-only peer-review probe independently confirmed their SOL-low frontmatter, unchanged current permission blocks, and zero active GPT-5.5 routing. Direct subagent execution is unavailable because CLI accepts primary agents only and Task permissions deny those agents.

skipped_stages.plan_review: Existing plan was explicit and low-risk bookkeeping.
skipped_stages.red_test_writing_and_test_runner: No production code or executable behavior change.
skipped_stages.stage_9_doc_writer: Waived: no additional public contract/setup documentation changed during closeout; a waiver artifact records this.
